name: a technology alias resolves the same as its canonical name
command: A=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" nodejs 2>&1 >/dev/null | grep -oE 'resolve=[a-z]+'); B=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" node 2>&1 >/dev/null | grep -oE 'resolve=[a-z]+'); [ "$A" = "$B" ] && [ -n "$A" ] && echo alias-resolves-same 1>&2
